---
title: "200c_project"
author: "Linette Page and Sofia Granados"
date: "2025-06-01"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Question and theoretical argument - lit??
SOFIA

# Data
SOFIA

# Descriptive Statistics
SOFIA

## Assumptions
SOFIA

# Models
## Balance table


## Matching

### Assumptions

### Application


## Weighting


### Application


# Sensitivity Analysis

## Assumptions

## Application


# Discussion

# Future
- cutoff of incidents per municipality - would having at least 25 be different than 0 or 1?
- Survey data
